name: tdc-suite

env_axis.name: split-type
env_axis.shift_mechanism: 66+ datasets with per-task built-in splits; scaffold uses Bemis-Murcko frameworks, temporal uses publication-year

ood_protocol.name: tdc-per-task-split
ood_protocol.ref: Huang et al. 2021 Nature Chemical Biology

schema.suite_note: suite — 66+ datasets across ADMET, DTI, bioactivity, toxicity. tdc-caco2 broken out as a core entry within suite.

facts: 66+ datasets across drug discovery (ADMET 22 endpoints, DTI, bioactivity, toxicity); 4.26M compounds, 34k genes, 60k peptides, 1.99M reactions; built-in scaffold / cold-start / temporal splits.
hypotheses: No single ADMET generalist method wins across all 22 endpoints; per-endpoint specialists dominate.
The temporal (publication-year) split gives a more honest estimate of real-world generalization for novel compounds than the scaffold split, because it better reflects the discovery timeline.
intuitions: A current TDC leaderboard with 2024-25 state-of-the-art results likely exists.
Cross-TDC molecular-foundation-model results have probably been published.
TDC has likely expanded to new task types beyond the original release.
unknowns: TDC bundles heterogeneous tasks (small-molecule properties, peptide, DTI, reactions) as 'drug discovery'; whether they cohere structurally is presupposed by curation, not justified.
The 'cold-start' split definition (novel compound / target / assay) differs per task, and inter-task consistency cannot be determined from the suite.
epistemic_state.boundary: The suite spans very heterogeneous content; a single suite-level method ordering does not apply across the bundled tasks.

representational_commitments: Bemis-Murcko scaffold definition for scaffold splits

MATERIALIZATION STATUS: tdc-caco2 fully materialized (separate manifest). ADME batch (BBB_Martins, HIA_Hou, PAMPA_NCATS, Lipophilicity_AstraZeneca) materialized as snapshots/tdc-suite/v0.4/tdc-adme-batch.tar.gz. Other 60+ TDC tasks pending.

curation_provenance.ref: Huang et al. 2021 Nature Chemical Biology
